query: SELECT s.name as sourceName, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customers c WHERE c.source = s.name) as customerCount FROM sources s WHERE s.name IN ('Gulf', 'KEN', 'MEA', 'facebook', 'fb', 'LINE') ORDER BY s.name;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user AnaPRc1Kpw1Jvjc.659756d42373 --database 6acGApiU8Bjnxuzxb5vkwU --execute SELECT s.name as sourceName, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customers c WHERE c.source = s.name) as customerCount FROM sources s WHERE s.name IN ('Gulf', 'KEN', 'MEA', 'facebook', 'fb', 'LINE') ORDER BY s.name;
